name: frontend-craft
description: Shared Claude Code plugin for frontend teams — agents, skills, hooks, and project templates for code review, design-to-code, architecture planning, security review, and UI debugging. All reports auto-saved as Markdown.

metadata.description: Shared Claude Code plugin for frontend teams

plugins.name: frontend-craft
plugins.description: Enterprise frontend team Claude Code plugin — 10 agents, 25 skills, 4 commands, shared rule templates, and production-ready hooks for code review, TypeScript review, security review, testing strategy, E2E, component testing, route protection, performance optimization, scaffolding, design-to-code (Figma/Sketch/MasterGo/Pixso/墨刀/摹客), legacy-to-modern migration, React/Vue/Next.js/Nuxt/monorepo standards, PWA, Web Workers, Canvas/Three.js, SVG animation, CI/CD, architecture planning, and UI debugging with multi-design-tool MCP integration. All reports auto-saved as Markdown files to reports/ directory.
